ksa_text: Skill in designing and maintaining a model risk governance framework, including policy development, role and responsibility definition, escalation protocols, exception management, and board-level model risk reporting.

dcwf.top_element_label: Develop and document supply chain risks for critical system elements, as appropriate.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Develop and document supply chain risks for critical system elements, as appropriate.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RM-S-006 (Risk Management/Skill) scores 0.497 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.497). Scope is edge_case for Trust Engineer: 1 in-scope signals, 0 out-of-scope signals. Seniority is appropriate.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Risk Management appears in approximately 62% of Trust Engineer job postings. AI risk assessment and harm mitigation central to Trust Engineering.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Risk Management is market-validated for Trust Engineer. Final decision: include.
